scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate --workspace @contract/db && npm run build --workspace @contract/db && npm run build --workspace @contract/shared && npm run build --workspace @contract/core && npm run build --workspace @contract/ui && npm run build --workspace @contract/api && npm run build --workspace @contract/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run prisma:generate --workspace @contract/db && npm run build --workspace @contract/db && npm run build --workspace @contract/shared && npm run build --workspace @contract/core && npm run dev --workspace @contract/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run prisma:generate --workspace @contract/db && npm run build --workspace @contract/db && npm run build --workspace @contract/shared && npm run build --workspace @contract/core && npm run build --workspace @contract/ui && npm run dev --workspace @contract/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @contract/shared && npm run build --workspace @contract/core && npm run test --workspace @contract/core && npm run test --workspace @contract/api && npm run test --workspace @contract/web
